def test_feature_branch_rebased_onto_main():
        """Priority 1: Use jj CLI to verify feature-branch is rebased onto main."""
        result = subprocess.run(
            ["jj", "log", "-r", "main..feature-branch", "--no-graph", "-T", "commit_id\n"],
            capture_output=True, text=True, cwd=PROJECT_DIR
        )
        assert result.returncode == 0, f"'jj log' failed: {result.stderr}"
    
        commits = [line for line in result.stdout.strip().split('\n') if line]
>       assert len(commits) == 2, f"Expected exactly 2 commits in main..feature-branch, got {len(commits)}: {commits}"
E       AssertionError: Expected exactly 2 commits in main..feature-branch, got 1: ['1d99e85e68a7fccee694a5c6a61329500f90f68044a6745d22038929d2775a9e6d889b0c3fb0b452']
E       assert 1 == 2
E        +  where 1 = len(['1d99e85e68a7fccee694a5c6a61329500f90f68044a6745d22038929d2775a9e6d889b0c3fb0b452'])

def test_no_unresolved_conflicts():
        """Priority 1: Use jj CLI to verify no unresolved conflicts exist."""
        result = subprocess.run(
            ["jj", "resolve", "--list", "-r", "feature-branch"],
            capture_output=True, text=True, cwd=PROJECT_DIR
        )
>       assert result.returncode == 0, f"'jj resolve --list' failed: {result.stderr}"
E       AssertionError: 'jj resolve --list' failed: Error: No conflicts found at this revision
E         
E       assert 2 == 0
E        +  where 2 = CompletedProcess(args=['jj', 'resolve', '--list', '-r', 'feature-branch'], returncode=2, stdout='', stderr='Error: No conflicts found at this revision\n').returncode
